title: Question: Basic questions: Multiple modules and using "#"
body:
---


Author Name: **Patrick Mulder** (@mulderp)
Original Redmine Message: 3164 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hello,

I want to play with some simple modules and signals and tried this:

```
module half_adder(x,y,s,c);                         
  input x, y;                                       
  output s, c;                                      
                                                     
  xor(s,x,y);                                       
  and(c,x,y);                                       
                                                     
endmodule                                           
                                                     
                                                     
                                                     
                                                     
module our;                                         
                                                     
    reg[1:0] in;                                     
    wire[3:0] out;                                   
                                                     
    initial begin                                    
      $display("Start.");                            
                                                     
      in = 2'b00;                                    
      #5                                             
      $display("input: %b", in);                     
                                                     
                                                     
      $finish;                                       
    end                                              
                                                     
endmodule                                           

```

1) Can I write several modules in one .v file? If not how would I structure these best?

2) How would I put a simple time model (using # equivalent) into the sim?

Thanks!
code_blocks:
module half_adder(x,y,s,c);                         
  input x, y;                                       
  output s, c;                                      
                                                     
  xor(s,x,y);                                       
  and(c,x,y);                                       
                                                     
endmodule                                           
                                                     
                                                     
                                                     
                                                     
module our;                                         
                                                     
    reg[1:0] in;                                     
    wire[3:0] out;                                   
                                                     
    initial begin                                    
      $display("Start.");                            
                                                     
      in = 2'b00;                                    
      #5                                             
      $display("input: %b", in);                     
                                                     
                                                     
      $finish;                                       
    end                                              
                                                     
endmodule
